benefits.description: Semaglutide caused way less hunger and food noise compared to tirzepatide and retatrutide
Lost more weight on semaglutide at 0.75mg/week than on tirzepatide at 10mg
Retatrutide may be better for body recomposition

side_effects.description: Retatrutide does not shut hunger down as much as semaglutide

protocol_notes: User has been on all three GLP-1 compounds over the last 7 months. Started with semaglutide, then tried tirzepatide (stacked with reta for a few weeks), currently on retatrutide for 3 weeks. Planning to bump retatrutide to 6mg split between 2 days a week or 1mg daily. Rates semaglutide as most effective for appetite suppression and weight loss at 0.75mg/week. Considers tirzepatide overpriced and less effective.
